subtitles.original: 幽閉利口逝く前に
subtitles.english: Before locking up the clever one...

subtitles.original: ユーヘイじゃ利口に難儀ダーリン
subtitles.english: Locking up the clever one is a pain, darling

subtitles.original: 幽閉ストップ知ってないし
subtitles.english: Don't lock me up! It's not like I knew

subtitles.original: 勘弁にしといてなんて惨忍
subtitles.english: Give me a break! You're so cruel

subtitles.original: 人様願う欠片のアイロニ
subtitles.english: The wishes of the people feel like scraps of irony

subtitles.original: だれもが願う無機質なような
subtitles.english: Everyone's wishing for a mechanical kind of thing

subtitles.original: 一足先に始めてたいような
subtitles.english: Wanting to get in on it before everyone else

subtitles.original: 先が見えないヴァージンハッピーショー
subtitles.english: A virgin happy show with an unpredictable future

subtitles.original: 無いの新たにお願い1つ
subtitles.english: I don't have a single brand-new wish

subtitles.original: 愛も変わらずおまけにワーニング ワーニング
subtitles.english: The same love as ever, plus a warning, warning

subtitles.original: 無いのあなたにお願い1つ
subtitles.english: I don't have a single wish for you

subtitles.original: 張り詰めた思い込め
subtitles.english: Putting all my tense thoughts into it

subtitles.original: レフトサイド ライトサイド
subtitles.english: Left side, right side

subtitles.original: 歯をむき出してパッパッパ
subtitles.english: Baring your fangs, pa-pa-pa

subtitles.original: 照れくさいね
subtitles.english: This is so embarrassing, isn't it?

subtitles.original: レフトサイド ライトサイド
subtitles.english: Left side, right side

subtitles.original: 歯を突き出してパッパッパッ ハハ
subtitles.english: Letting your fangs poke out, pa-pa-pa-pa, haha

subtitles.original: YOU ARE KING
subtitles.english: You are King

subtitles.original: 無邪気に遊ぶ期待期待のダーリン
subtitles.english: Playing innocently, you're the darling I've been wishing for

subtitles.original: 健気に見笑う痛い痛いの消える
subtitles.english: When you laugh admirably, all of my pain disappears

subtitles.original: 無様に〇ねる苦い思いも無くなって
subtitles.english: And I can die clumsily, my bitter feelings fading too

subtitles.original: ラララ ブウ ラッタッタ
subtitles.english: La-la-la, boo, rat-tat-tat

subtitles.original: 嫌い嫌いの最低泣いてダウン
subtitles.english: I hate it, it's the worst—I burst into tears and I'm down

subtitles.original: 毎度新たにお願い1つ
subtitles.english: Every time, I have one new wish...
